a.xlink:title: STM32 platform-specific type definitions for hardware abstraction.
STM32 ADC wrapper — wraps STM32 HAL ADC via CubeMX-generated handle.
STM32 CAN wrapper — wraps bxCAN (CAN_HandleTypeDef) or FDCAN (FDCAN_HandleTypeDef) for BaseCan interf...
STM32 GPIO wrapper — full HAL integration with EXTI interrupt support.
STM32 I2C Bus+Device wrapper — wraps STM32 HAL I2C via CubeMX handle.
STM32 Logger — UART/SWO/ITM-based logging with full BaseLogger interface.
STM32 NVS (Non-Volatile Storage) — flash-based key-value store.
STM32 Periodic Timer — wraps TIM_HandleTypeDef for periodic callbacks.
STM32 PWM wrapper — wraps TIM_HandleTypeDef for BasePwm interface.
STM32 SPI Bus+Device wrapper — wraps STM32 HAL SPI via CubeMX handle.

STM32 UART wrapper — wraps UART_HandleTypeDef for BaseUart interface.

STM32 CAN implementation — bxCAN + FDCAN dual-variant support.
STM32 GPIO wrapper implementation — full STM32 HAL integration.
